title: Validate optional blob/space ID params in create methods
description: Three optional ID fields sent to the wire lack empty-string guards: (1) custom_emoji_create space_id (2) space_create icon_blob_id (3) chat_create Group avatar_blob_id. All are identifier fields — when Some("") they would send an invalid empty string to the server. Also strengthen two AppState tests (apply_chats_loaded, apply_chats_delta_adds_new_chat) that assert equality against a deserialized object instead of checking specific spec-derived field values.
